summary: Code Review and Structural Verification for Extra Life Success Modal and Player Stats Share Buttons - Iteration 6. Both features verified via code review. Frontend builds successfully without errors. Backend /api/happy-hour/status endpoint working (200 OK). No UI testing possible for these features as they require wallet connection and real DOGE payment flow.
critical_code_review_comments: ✅ DailyLimitTracker.jsx Lines 371-375: Card has conditional gradient - 'from-green-600 via-green-700 to-emerald-800' when purchaseResult?.success is true, otherwise rose colors
✅ DailyLimitTracker.jsx Lines 379-398: Success state shows CheckCircle2 icon, 'Payment Confirmed!' heading, treats_amount display, and 'Continue Mixing' button
✅ DailyLimitTracker.jsx Line 387: purchaseResult.treats_amount is displayed in success state
✅ DailyLimitTracker.jsx Lines 173-179: purchaseResult stores treats_amount when purchase completes
✅ PlayerStatsModal.jsx Line 5: html2canvas is imported from 'html2canvas'
✅ PlayerStatsModal.jsx Line 41: cardRef created with useRef(null)
✅ PlayerStatsModal.jsx Line 158: ref={cardRef} attached to Card element
✅ PlayerStatsModal.jsx Lines 89-100: getShareText() generates stats text for sharing
✅ PlayerStatsModal.jsx Lines 102-131: handleShareImage() uses html2canvas with cardRef.current
✅ PlayerStatsModal.jsx Lines 134-138: handleShareTwitter() opens twitter.com/intent/tweet URL with encodeURIComponent
✅ PlayerStatsModal.jsx Lines 347-361: 'Save Stats' button with data-testid='share-stats-image-btn'
✅ PlayerStatsModal.jsx Lines 362-369: 'Share on X' button with data-testid='share-stats-twitter-btn'
✅ html2canvas@1.4.1 is installed and listed in package.json
✅ Card component (ui/card.jsx) uses React.forwardRef - ref forwarding works correctly
✅ Frontend builds without errors (yarn build completed successfully)
✅ ESLint shows no issues in both components

success_rate.frontend: 100% code review - all features correctly implemented

context_for_next_testing_agent: Extra Life Success Modal and Player Stats Share Buttons are code-complete. Features require wallet connection and real DOGE payment to test interactively. Code structure verified via static analysis. Lab page shows character selection for guest users - need logged-in player to see DailyLimitTracker and PlayerStatsModal components.

build_verification.eslint: ✅ No linting issues in DailyLimitTracker.jsx or PlayerStatsModal.jsx
